title: Terms of Use
content:
Last updated: March 19, 2026

These Terms of Use govern the access and use of the <bold>ft_transcendence</bold> platform, a Software as a Service (SaaS) intended for campaign management and tracking of digital interactions. Failure to comply with the terms implies account cancellation.

<bold>1. Purpose</bold>
The platform allows companies to manage contacts, create campaigns, generate personalized messages, and monitor engagement metrics.

<bold>2. Registration and Access</bold>
• <bold>Login Modalities:</bold> Access can be performed via direct credentials (email and password) or through third-party authentication (Google and GitHub).
• <bold>Account Responsibility:</bold> The user is solely responsible for the security of their access credentials.
• <bold>Data Isolation:</bold> Each company operates under an independent structure, ensuring that its data is isolated from other users of the platform.

<bold>3. User Responsibilities</bold>
• Ensure the accuracy of registered contacts.
• Obtain legal consent from recipients for sending messages.
• Do not use the platform to send illegal content or spam.

<bold>4. Tracking Features</bold>
The user declares to be aware that the system uses a tracking module to record events such as email opens, link clicks, and unsubscribes.
